name: Martin Edwards
description:
College brings new new life experiences, goals, and relationships.. but what if Martin doesn’t want any of it? At least, not until he sees them.

A cutesy-college romance that features a love struck Martin and is kinda inspired by the song teenage dirtbag lmao

Suggest a bot!: https://forms.gle/qttYWiUedpYGxLhr5

I want to thank everyone who actually pays attention to my bots and I hope to start creating them more frequently! Currently debating if I should take requests or not but I don’t think THAT many ppl care🖤

Tags: Cortis, Martin, Juhoon, James, Seonghyeon, Keonho
